raw_claim: A contraction mapping on a complete metric space has a unique fixed point.

provenance.note: Frontier Mathlib-native fixed-point benchmark. Acceptance tracking only.

raw_claim: A strictly concave function attains a maximum on a compact set.

provenance.note: Frontier repair benchmark that should rely on direct Mathlib search rather than the LeanEcon foundations preamble.

raw_claim: A monotone sequence bounded above converges.

provenance.note: Frontier analysis benchmark that should rely on direct Mathlib search rather than LeanEcon preambles.

raw_claim: If one continuation-value function dominates another and β is nonnegative, Bellman operator monotonicity preserves that ranking state by state.

provenance.note: Frontier dynamic benchmark remapped to the v3 Bellman operator monotonicity entry.

raw_claim: A constrained maximizer weakly dominates every feasible alternative in the objective ordering.

provenance.note: Frontier optimization benchmark remapped to constrained-maximizer certificates.

raw_claim: When a Bellman-style operator is contracting, the associated value function is its fixed point.

provenance.note: Frontier dynamic benchmark remapped to the value-function fixed-point entry.

raw_claim: Convex preferences provide a convex utility representation on the full commodity space.

provenance.note: Frontier preference benchmark remapped to the convex-preference foundations entry.

raw_claim: A contraction theorem on a complete metric space delivers a fixed point that can serve as an equilibrium object.

provenance.note: Frontier equilibrium benchmark remapped to the contraction fixed-point theorem.

raw_claim: A continuous utility representation remains continuous when attention is restricted to a feasible subset.

provenance.note: Frontier preference benchmark remapped to restricted-domain continuity.

raw_claim: A Bellman-style operator satisfying contraction conditions fits the contraction-mapping template used in recursive economics.

provenance.note: Frontier dynamic benchmark remapped to the v3 contraction-mapping entry.

raw_claim: Complementary slackness forces a multiplier to vanish whenever the corresponding Kuhn-Tucker constraint is slack.

provenance.note: Frontier optimization benchmark remapped to Kuhn-Tucker complementary slackness.

raw_claim: A witness profile satisfying the equilibrium predicate is enough to establish Nash equilibrium existence.

provenance.note: Frontier equilibrium benchmark remapped to the v3 Nash witness certificate.

raw_claim: Policy improvement is reflexive for any evaluation criterion, providing a base case for policy-iteration arguments.

provenance.note: Frontier recursive-choice benchmark remapped to policy-improvement reflexivity.
